mods.name: Drop-In Performance Air Filter
mods.description: High-flow drop-in filter for the stock airbox provides a small bump in airflow without any fitment concerns or CEL risk.
mods.installNotes: Pop open the airbox lid, swap the paper filter for the performance filter. No tools needed. Reoil every 25,000 miles.

mods.name: Sport Exhaust (Valved)
mods.description: A valved exhaust system lets you switch between a refined cruise mode and full race-car volume at the press of a button, perfect for the 991's flat-6.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt rear mufflers at the mid-pipe flange. Hang new system on factory mounts. Connect valve wiring to factory sport exhaust switch. 1.5 hour install.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the 991 by 15–20mm for a more planted look and sharper handling. Compatible with both PASM and standard suspension.
mods.installNotes: Spring swap at all four corners with spring compressor. PASM remains functional. Alignment required after install. Ride quality stays close to stock.

mods.name: ECU Software Tune
mods.description: Optimize engine mapping for the 991.1 3.4/3.8L NA or 991.2 3.0T engines. Gains of 20–30hp on NA cars, 40–60hp on turbo models.
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II port. 991.2 turbo models see the biggest gains. Use 93+ octane. Save stock map before flashing. Remove tune before dealer visits.

mods.name: Upgraded Sway Bars
mods.description: Stiffer front and rear anti-roll bars reduce body roll in corners and allow fine-tuning of understeer/oversteer balance for track driving.
mods.partNumbers: SuperPro RC0045FZ-22 (front), GMG Racing adjustable rear
mods.installNotes: Remove factory sway bars and endlinks. Install new bars with provided bushings. Rear bar typically comes with adjustable endlinks for rate tuning. 3 hour install on a lift.

mods.name: Big Brake Kit
mods.description: Upgrade to larger diameter rotors and 6-piston front calipers for substantially shorter stopping distances and better brake feel on track.
mods.partNumbers: AP Racing CP9660 Radi-CAL, Brembo GT 1Q2.9509A
mods.installNotes: Requires 20-inch wheels minimum for caliper clearance. Replace rotors and calipers as a set. Full brake fluid flush with DOT 4 racing fluid. Professional install recommended.

mods.name: Full Coilover Kit
mods.description: Replace the entire suspension with fully adjustable coilovers for precise ride height, damping, and spring rate control. The ultimate handling upgrade.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins Road & Track POS MI20, KW Clubsport 3-way
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all four corners. Requires PASM delete coding on equipped cars. Set ride height to factory or 10mm lower. Corner balance and alignment mandatory.

mods.name: Turbo Upgrade Kit (991.2)
mods.description: Upgraded turbochargers for the 991.2 3.0T engine, pushing power from the stock 370–450hp range to 550–650hp with supporting mods.
mods.partNumbers: TPC Racing Stage 2 Turbo Kit, Pure Turbos 991.2
mods.installNotes: Engine must be partially removed for turbo access. Requires upgraded fuel injectors, HPFP, intercooler, and custom ECU calibration. Clutch upgrade mandatory on manual cars. 30+ hour professional job.
